name: SMS Contact Management
description: Full CRUD, search, import/export for SMS contacts in a shared SQLite database. Provides agent tools and an interactive blessed TUI.

dbPath.description: Path to SQLite database file. If omitted, auto-discovered from voipms-sms or openclaw-twilio plugin config.

contactTable.description: Manual override for contact table schema. If omitted, auto-discovered from dependent plugin.

columns.description: Allowed columns for read/write. If omitted, discovered via PRAGMA table_info.

displayName.description: Column to use as contact display name

discoverFrom.description: Which plugin to discover DB path and schema from. 'auto' tries voipms-sms first, then openclaw-twilio.
